Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this is a process mining task where I need to analyze an event log for a customer support ticket system The user wants me to identify cases with long resolution times find root causes and suggest improvements

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I should calculate the total resolution time for each case by finding the time difference between the first and last events

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the data Case 102 104 and 105 seem to span multiple days while others are resolved within hours

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The pattern is clear escalations to Level 2 agents and long idle times before investigation are the main bottlenecks

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For example Case 105 has a 29 hour gap between escalation and the next investigation Also tickets assigned to Level 1 agents sometimes sit idle for hours before investigation starts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I can propose specific recommendations like parallel workflows for escalations real time dashboards to monitor idle tickets and dedicated Level 2 queues to reduce handoff delays

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The key is to balance workload and minimize waiting times between steps
